Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Wrobel for Norman Tse, Petitioner/Proposed Executor (via Zoom).

The court noted that letters of administration had previously been issued to Norman Tse. The court proposed revoking the prior letters of administration, admitting the will to probate, and appointing Norman Tse as executor with full IAEA authority. Mr. Wrobel agreed, and no objections were raised.

There being no objections, the court revoked the letters of administration previously issued to Norman Tse and granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 2, 1016, is admitted to probate. Norman Tse is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for July 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Karen Ann Simons remains as the appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order
